meaning: n.舞台,戏剧,活动场所,发展的进程,阶段或时期,驿站vt.上演,筹备,举行
examples: He was booed off the stage.
The theatre has a revolving stage.
They then began to divide into embryos, but none grew past the six-cell stage.
That European Court ruling led to a two-stage Ministry of Justice consultation on how to best change.
